---
name: Request a Template or Tool
about: Need a legal template, Terraform config, cost calculator, or other resource that doesn't exist yet?
title: "[REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you need?

Describe the template, tool, or resource you're looking for.


---

## What type of resource is this?

- [ ] Legal template (contract addendum, data classification policy, etc.)
- [ ] Infrastructure code (Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, etc.)
- [ ] Policy document (AI governance, incident response, etc.)
- [ ] Cost calculator or financial model
- [ ] Implementation guide or how-to
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## What platform or context is it for?

(e.g., Salesforce, AWS, Azure, GCP, general tribal governance, etc.)


---

## Why do you need it?

What problem are you trying to solve? The more context you share, the better we can prioritize and scope the work.


---

## Have you seen something similar elsewhere?

If there's an existing resource — even an imperfect one — that we could adapt or build on, link it here.
